Router

The router in Elegance refers to the routing system used by the included Elegance Server.

It contains a few helper functions you can call within pages to get parts of the request, reroute the request, etc.

For obvious reasons these are only available in dynamic pages, and only during the compilation of the page, unless you store the result in state.

Utilities

redirect

Takes in a pathname and re-routes the request to that with default statusCode 302.

respondWith

A utility that lets you respond with a few preset HTTP status codes, useful for things like dynamic routes that may or may not contain the request the user wants.

These use status code pages if the Elegance Server allows for them.

  • notFound
  • notAuthorized
  • forbidden
  • internalError
